title: When a Robot uses stop-losses, where does the order show the stop-loss being used?
author: ArticleSalt8689
selftext: I'm trying the **Swing Trader $5<Stock<$20** robot that says it uses "**stop loss equal to 2-7%% depending on the market situation".**  I don't see the stop loss on the open orders.  How do I know where to set the stop-loss is so I can add it to my order?  Or, do I just have to mimic the closing order when it happens?
